name: Denied claim after AI use—can I appeal in Philadelphia mentioning AI?

mainEntity.name: Denied claim after AI use—can I appeal in Philadelphia mentioning AI?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, appeal within 30-60 days; AI irrelevant unless used against you.[1] Key factors: new evidence allowed sometimes; bad faith if withheld; strict deadlines.[1] Gather stronger docs; attorney files; avoid AI in appeal.[1] Fresh eyes win reversals.
